free_text: (d,p) stripping reactions in the silicon isotopes
English translation of ZET,36,52
Data for Si-28,30 are given.
72-cm cyclotron was used.
Energy spread of the beam was less than 40 keV.
Nuclear photoplates with emulsion thickness of
100 and 200 microns were located at the angles between
6.5 and 150 degrees to the incident beam direction.
Photoplates were placed at a distance of approximately
10 cm from the target.
The targets were prepared by deposition of powdered
SiO2 on a gold backing with the thickness of
Reference code was added.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
Arbitrary unit is equal to 7.30 mb/sr.
Si-29 target thickness was 0.30 mg/cm2. Abundance of
isotope in Si-29 target: Si-28 (34.6%); Si-29 (63.9%);
